name: A new way to summon Vizier based on dark cuisine

pages.text: Tired of searching for Woodland Mansions, you start to consider: as the Dark Scroll can call Vizier out IN a Mansion, how about run a ritual to MAKE UP a fake Mansion environment?

You choose the $(l:goety:rituals/magic_ritual)Magic Ritual$() to have a try, put some Mansion-characteristic blocks: dark oak wood planks and cobblestones, on the pedestals. However, these simple materials may still not be persuasive enough to make Vizier believe that the calling of Scroll comes from a real Woodland Mansion. You need something REALLY can remind Vizier that “this IS a Mansion!”$(br)Suddenly, you come up with a $(l:goety:food/vizier_food/food/creamy_berry_fish_paste_dumpling_with_chocolate_sauce)strange dark cuisine... （
Bingo! Tiring dark forest journey has been swept into the garbage dump of history. The whole world would agree Vizier’ s stomach to become the only victim, probably…
